author: Josse Clichtove
title: Elucidatorium ecclesiasticum
remarks: Contains commentary on the hours (100), on sequences, hymns, on the mass (115). Gloss format: Gloria, Creed, Canon. For Clichtove, the works of Jean-Pierre Massaut are indispensable. See Jean-Pierre Massaut, Josse Clichtove: l’humanisme et la réforme du clergé, 2 vols. (Paris: Les Belles lettres, 1968); idem, Critique et tradition à la veille de la Réforme en France (Paris: Vrin, 1974); and for an updated bibliography of secondary literature, idem, ‘Clichtove (Josse)’, in Colette Nativel (ed.), Centuriae Latinae II: cent une figures humanistes de la Renaissance aux Lumières (Geneva: Droz, 2006), 221–25.
